summary: Web app project with admin login page and currency display ($ to ₹) features being implemented.
known_issues: Builds have been hitting iteration/budget limits and not completing successfully, resulting in no changes being applied.

existing_features.title: On the LoginPage, ensure the admin login option is clearly visible and accessible. The toggle or button to switch to 'admin' login mode must be displayed prominently on the page without requiring any hidden interaction or URL parameter manipulation.

On the LoginPage, display a currency note or label showing the Indian Rupee symbol (₹) instead of or alongside the US Dollar symbol ($). Any pricing or currency references on the login page must use ₹ (INR) formatting.

Ensure all login flows (both user and admin) correctly persist session/authentication state after login so that the user remains logged in on navigation. Post-login redirects must work: admin users go to the admin dashboard, registered users go to the user dashboard, and unregistered users go to the registration page.

new_feature_requests.summary: Currency display conversion from dollars to rupees on the login page
